signal: Track integrity check false-positive: closeout-event track entries use event+summary schema (no turn or completed fields). Wakeup check tests d.get(completed) which fails, flagging valid closeout sessions as INTERRUPTED. Fix: check for event==closeout OR completed==true when determining track health.
rationale: False INTERRUPTED detection causes unnecessary recovery prompts at wakeup, erodes trust in the integrity check, and may cause redundant recovery work.
title: Track integrity check false-positive: closeout-event track entries use event+sum...
